title: Aybri's Angelic Artificiality
description: Tech and magic collides in a chaotic modpack meant for both lovers of complexity and lovers of cool flashy action!
body:
Magic mods. From easy-to-understand and flashy, to complex and thought-provoking.

Tech mods. From easy-to-understand and flashy, to... um, complex and, uh, thought-provoking...

Does... does anyone else see a pattern here?

![Logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/XlmyDJOI/images/6e7fd4e08d0d15e497a46f1b2925e4618763786a.png)

Angelic Artificiality is what you get when you take a shut-in trans girl who loves both neat tech stuff and cool magic systems (aka me, Aybri, yours truly) and you give her the entirety of Modrinth and CurseForge to mess around with. From CC: Tweaked and Create to Malum ~~and Manic~~ (not yet waiting for other mods to update) (plus some extra bonus stuff), it's like you're in the middle of a writers convention and the magic nerds, sci-fi nerds, and steampunk nerds are all duking it out and have somehow brought what they wrote into real life.

Eventually, once I finally learn Java, this modpack will have it's own custom mods specifically made for it SwitchCraft-style and I'll probably make a proper server. In the meantime, enjoy the chaos!

The current version of the mod is a base that things are gonna build off of. I will probably remove a couple things but I am *definitely* adding a lot more onto it. Once Create Fabric is updated to 1.20 the modpack will soon follow.
